foreignObject.div: SubQL compiles SQL WHERE predicates into bytecode programs, indexes them with a 5-level hybrid index, and evaluates incoming CDC events against all active subscriptions using lock-free atomic snapshots, dispatching matched user sets via compressed RoaringBitmap operations.
SQL-correct TRUE / FALSE / UNKNOWN evaluation with full three-valued logic. De Morgan’s law compliance, short-circuit optimization on AND/OR operators.
5-level index pruning with RoaringBitmap compressed integer sets. Equality, range, NULL, dependency, and fallback indexes for fast candidate selection.
ArcSwap atomic snapshots for zero-contention reads. Single-writer model with immutable snapshot sharing. O(1) bitmap union for user resolution.

g.text: SQL String → AST → Normalized SQL → BytecodeProgram → PredicateId → RoaringBitmap → Vec<UserId>
INSERT/UPDATE → new_row | DELETE → old_row | UPDATE hint: changed_columns
Cmp(6) Equal NotEqual LessThan GreaterThan LT/GTE
Null(2) IsNull IsNotNull Logic(3) And Or Not
Arith(6) Add Sub Mul Div Mod Neg Special(3) In Between Like
Merge: dedup predicates by hash (keep newest) • dedup bindings by subscription_id
OID → Cell type conversion + JSON inference

foreignObject.div: PostgreSQL output plugin. Batched: one JSON message per transaction containing all row changes. Includes column types and oldkeys.
PostgreSQL output plugin. Per-change: one JSON message per row change. Identity columns for UPDATE/DELETE PK extraction.
Kafka Connect CDC. JSON envelope with before/after row snapshots and source metadata. Supports snapshot reads (op: “r”).
MySQL binlog reader. One JSON message per row change with data/old maps. Type inference from bare JSON (no column types).
PostgreSQL native binary replication protocol. Stateful: caches Relation messages for OID-to-schema lookup. Zero-copy binary parsing.

g.text: 5-level candidate selection, union of all matching bitmaps → VM evaluation for precision
Matches: col > N, col < N, BETWEEN (sorted by lower bound)
Matches: IS NULL, IS NOT NULL
UPDATE optimization: skip predicates unrelated to changed_columns
Catches: LIKE, NOT EQUAL, complex expressions, unindexable predicates

foreignObject.div: Stream database changes to WebSocket clients with per-user SQL filter predicates.
Route database events to tenant-specific handlers based on subscription predicates.
Evaluate complex conditions to determine which users should receive alerts.
Ephemeral subscriptions tied to user sessions with automatic cleanup on disconnect.

g.text: Arc<str> and Arc<[Cell]> for shared row images across readers
RoaringBitmap for O(1) union/intersection on predicate sets
128-bit dual-seahash of normalized SQL eliminates redundant evaluation
ahash for runtime maps (fast, non-deterministic) • seahash for stable predicate identity
Level 4 fast compression for shard payloads, prioritizes decode speed
SubQL • Version 0.1.0 • MIT License • Rust 2021 Edition
Dependencies: sqlparser • roaring • arc-swap • ahash • seahash • bincode • lz4 • slab • serde
#![forbid(unsafe_code)] • PostgreSQL / MySQL / SQLite dialects • Lock-free dispatch with ArcSwap
